stepPrerequisite_desc: Installing Maarch Courrier requires a number of prerequisites at the PHP installation level. For more information
install_unoconv_desc: Conversion tools for office documents soffice/unoconv installed
install_pdoPgsql_desc: PHP extension for connecting to PostgreSQL databases
install_mbstring_desc: PHP extension providing specific string manipulation functions that allow you to work with multi-byte encodings in PHP.
install_fileinfo_desc: PHP extension providing the content type and encoding of a file by looking at certain magic byte sequences at specific positions within the file.
install_gd_desc: PHP extension for image manipulation, in a wide variety of formats, such as GIF, PNG, JPEG, WBMP and XPM.
install_imagick_desc: PHP extension to create and modify images, using the ImageMagick API.
install_json_desc: PHP extension allowing the use of the data exchange format" JavaScript Object Notation (JSON).
install_wkhtmlToPdf_desc: Tool for converting HTML to PDF and various image formats using the Qt WebKit rendering engine.
install_gettext_desc: PHP extension allowing the implementation of the NLS (Native Language Support) API which can be used to internationalize your PHP scripts.
install_xml_desc: PHP extension using the expat library provided with the distribution.
install_curl_desc: Tool for downloading any files via various protocols.
install_zip_desc: Tool for packaging and compressing files.
install_writable: Read and write permissions for Maarch Courrier root directory
install_netcatOrNmap_desc: Utility allowing to open network connections (netcat / nmap)
stepDatabase_desc: Maarch Courrier requires a connection to a database to store document metadata and application configuration.
stepDocserver_desc: Any storage system can be used, as long as it presents a direct access "file system". This can be the case of a direct or indirect attachment of NFS type on a SAN, NAS bay, or for simple cases a set of RAID disks.
trafficRecordSummarySheetParameters: Traffic module for the link sheet
stepCustomization_desc: Maarch Courrier allows you to customize your application to perfectly integrate it into your work environment.
stepUserAdmin_desc: Define a system user to connect to the application.

redirectionDesc: Opens a modal allowing to choose a new processing user OR to redefine the processing service with a new distribution list
simpleConfirmDesc: Simply opens a confirmation modal for the action to be performed
closeMailDesc: Updates the closing date of a mail. ESSENTIAL to end your mail workflow
setPersistentModeOnDesc: Allows to keep a mail in a basket regardless of its state. Inserts the data in the 'basket_persistent_mode' table
setPersistentModeOffDesc: Resets the mail viewing behavior in the basket. Deletes the data in the 'basket_persistent_mode' table
markAsReadDesc: Marks the mail as 'read' in the basket. Inserts the data in the 'res_mark_as_read' table (useful if used in basket clauses)
closeMailAndIndexDesc: Updates the closing date of a mail AND opens the indexing page to register a new mail
closeMailWithAttachmentDesc: Updates the closing date of a mail with MANDATORY presence of attachment(s) / annotation(s)
proceedWorkflowDesc: Updates the visa date of the current reviewer/signatory present in the mail's visa circuit ('process_date' of the listinstance table)
interruptWorkflowDesc: Updates the visa date of the current reviewer/signatory and all following reviewers present in the mail's visa circuit ('process_date' of the listinstance table). Also inserts an interruption message on the current reviewer ('process_comment' of the listinstance table)
resetVisaWorkflowDesc: Resets the visa date of all reviewers present in the mail's visa circuit ('process_date' of the listinstance table)
rejectionWorkflowPreviousDesc: Resets the visa date of the previous reviewer present in the mail's visa circuit ('process_date' of the listinstance table)
redirectWorkflowEntityDesc: Returns the mail to the initiating entity
sendToVisaDesc: Checks if a visa circuit is configured AND if one or more response projects are associated with the mail
sendDocsToRecommendationDesc: Opens a modal allowing to add or remove people for opinion in the distribution list
validateRecommendationDesc: Allows adding in the opinion request annotation the person who checked the request
sendToAvisWfDesc: Opens a modal allowing to configure an opinion circuit for the mail
proceedWorkflowAvisDesc: Updates the opinion giving date of the current advisor of the opinion circuit ('process_date' of the listinstance table)
proceedWorkflowAvisSimpleDesc: Updates the opinion giving date of the user present in opinion in the mail's distribution list ('process_date' of the listinstance table)

maarch2maarchDesc:
The M2M functionality allows sending a mail and attachments between two instances of Maarch Courrier, or between Maarch Courrier and another GED.
Data is transmitted in a ZIP archive either by mail sending (and Maarch Capture), or by REST web service, or manually (more information).

adminLadDesc: Administration of the Automatic Document Reading tool

mercureDesc1: MERCURE is the automatic document reading (ADR) engine integrated into Maarch Courrier. It was developed by Maarch and specially configured for correspondence recognition.
mercureDesc2: Mercure is also widely used for mass recognition of all types of documents: contact us for other uses than correspondence reading.
mercureDesc3: Mercure analyzes only PDF format documents. If the document has not been OCRed (i.e. the text has not been extracted), Mercure will do it for you. It will then try to recognize the subject, the date, link the mail to an existing contact, and enter everything in the registration form.
mercureDesc4: No more input needed, and this works for scanned documents as well as digital documents, directly in the indexing/qualification page thanks to Mercure's native integration in Maarch Courrier!
mercureContactInfo: For more information, consult our documentation or contact us
